violations.detail: The base image provides CUDA 12.1, but the install references cu118. Wheels built for a mismatched CUDA version may fail at runtime or silently fall back to CPU execution.
violations.message: CUDA version mismatch: install targets cu118 (CUDA 11.8) but base image provides CUDA 12.1
violations.sourceCode: RUN pip install --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu118 torch torchvision

suggestedFix.description: Update CUDA wheel index/suffix to cu121 to match base image (CUDA 12.1)

suggestedFixes.description: Update CUDA wheel index/suffix to cu121 to match base image (CUDA 12.1)
Update base image to CUDA 11.8 to match installed wheels
